NetSparkleUpdater.​Downloaders.​WebRequestAppCastDataDownloader
NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​IAppCastDataDownloader
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​Downloaders.​WebRequestAppCastDataDownloader

Class that takes care of downloading data for an app cast, including the app cast itself as well as the app cast signature (if available). Allows you to send extra JSON with your request for the app cast information.

Variables
_logger
private ILogger? _logger
_appcastUrl
private string _appcastUrl
Functions
WebRequestAppCastDataDownloader
public WebRequestAppCastDataDownloader()

Default constructor for the app cast data downloader.

WebRequestAppCastDataDownloader
public WebRequestAppCastDataDownloader(
ILogger? 
logger
)

Default constructor for the app cast data downloader.

Parameter
logger
ILogger?

ILogger to write logs to

Properties
LogWriter
public ILogger? LogWriter {
set;
get
}

ILogger to log data from WebRequestAppCastDataDownloader

TrustEverySSLConnection
public bool TrustEverySSLConnection {
get;
set
}

If true, don't check the validity of SSL certificates. Defaults to false.

ExtraJsonData
public string? ExtraJsonData {
get;
set
}

If not "", sends extra JSON via POST to server with the web request for update information and for the app cast signature.

RedirectHandler
public RedirectHandler? RedirectHandler {
get;
set
}

Set this to handle redirects that manually, e.g. redirects that go from HTTPS to HTTP (which are not allowed by default)

Functions
DownloadAndGetAppCastData
public string DownloadAndGetAppCastData(
string 
url
)
DownloadAndGetAppCastDataAsync
public async Task<string> DownloadAndGetAppCastDataAsync(
string 
url
)

Used for both async downloading app cast and the app cast's .signature file.  Note that you must handle your own exceptions if they occur.  Otherwise, at SparkleUpdater will act as though the appcast failed to download.

Parameter
url
string

string URL for the place where the app cast can be downloaded

Returns

The Task to retrieve the app cast data encoded as a string

CreateHttpClient
protected virtual HttpClient CreateHttpClient()

Create the HttpClient used for file downloads

Returns

The client used for file downloads

CreateHttpClient
protected virtual HttpClient CreateHttpClient(
HttpClientHandler? 
handler
)

Create the HttpClient used for file downloads (with nullable handler)

Parameter
handler
HttpClientHandler?

HttpClientHandler for messages

Returns

The client used for file downloads

object 
sender,

certificate,

chain,
SslPolicyErrors

)

Determine if the remote X509 certificate is valid

sender
object

the web request that is being made
